composer.aria_label: Type a message to send to this anchor

status.mic_commit_aria: Stop listening and submit voice turn
status.voice_capture_inactive_error: Foreground voice capture is no longer active.

loading.title: Preparing the avatar
loading.summary: The local visual carrier is loading and the first-party Runtime path is being prepared from the desktop launch handoff.
loading.recovery: Keep this surface open while Runtime prepares the live companion path.

degraded_reauth_required.title: Runtime account session is not authenticated
degraded_reauth_required.summary: Avatar requires an authenticated Runtime account before it can mount the live carrier.
degraded_reauth_required.summary_with_reason: Avatar requires an authenticated Runtime account. Reason: {{reason}}.
degraded_reauth_required.recovery: Sign in through the desktop account flow, then relaunch this avatar surface.

degraded_runtime_unavailable.title: Runtime interaction path is not ready
degraded_runtime_unavailable.summary: The local Runtime is not currently delivering the avatar carrier.
degraded_runtime_unavailable.summary_with_reason: Runtime rejected or did not deliver the avatar carrier. Reason: {{reason}}.
degraded_runtime_unavailable.recovery: Restore the local Runtime daemon, then relaunch this surface from desktop.

degraded_launch_context_invalid.title: Launch context invalid
degraded_launch_context_invalid.summary: This avatar instance was reached without a valid launch handoff. Avatar must be opened from a desktop orchestrator with a real agent target.
degraded_launch_context_invalid.recovery: Start the avatar again from the desktop orchestrator.

error_bootstrap_fatal.title: Avatar surface failed to start
error_bootstrap_fatal.summary: An untyped bootstrap error stopped the shell before it could mount.
error_bootstrap_fatal.summary_with_reason: An untyped bootstrap error stopped the shell. Reason: {{reason}}.
error_bootstrap_fatal.recovery: Reload the avatar shell. If the failure repeats, check Runtime daemon logs.

relaunch_pending.title: Desktop sent a launch update
relaunch_pending.summary: The desktop orchestrator pushed a new launch context. This shell will reload to bind the new agent / instance.
relaunch_pending.recovery: Reload the shell to prepare the new desktop-selected context. No prior ready state is kept alive locally.

unknown.title: Avatar surface paused
unknown.summary: The shell is in an unexpected composition state. This is a defensive degraded posture.
unknown.recovery: Reload the avatar shell to restore a known posture.

bubble_auto_collapse.label: Auto-collapse quiet bubble
bubble_auto_collapse.help: Settle the bubble after a calm pause.

show_voice_captions.label: Show voice captions
show_voice_captions.note: Voice captions remain bounded to the current explicit anchor either way.
